title: Personalized view per account
excerpt:
Is there a way to save a view as my main but for anyone else who accesses the board it will remain as it was when it was created. 
In addition, is there a way to save a filtered view that only I need without it saving fo…

posts.author: Ariesence (Laketa Kinya Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to save a view as my main but for anyone else who accesses the board it will remain as it was when it was created.

In addition, is there a way to save a filtered view that only I need without it saving for everyone who accesses the board. So it will only be on my account and now for the entire group.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Laketa,

At this time, save sorts or filters will save to a new view and not to the main table. I apologise for the setback here That being said, we currently working on a new feature called, locked views - this will allow users to lock views that they have created. The lock of the views means that users without permissions won’t be able to save the following actions:

  • Change filters
  • Sort column/items
  • Conditional coloring
  • Delete the view

Does this sound like it will help you for both queries?

posts.author: Ariesence (Laketa Kinya Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: It is something I can use just not for this particular dilemma.
